name: qacito
description: Autonomous local QA platform. Drives Playwright tests, coverage, flakiness detection, and accessibility audits — all from Claude Desktop. Supports URL-first black-box testing mode — discovers routes via sitemap or Playwright crawl, supports Cypress test runner, and generates specs from Figma designs via the Figma MCP.

default_project_root.title: Default project folder (optional)
default_project_root.description: Convenience default shown in prompts. Tools still accept projectRoot per call.
